//: Expected-cell spec — the load-bearing contract for the core-loop-proof matrix (T2, hk-1yxhh).
//schema: One object per {harness}×{substrate} cell. The assertion library (scripts/core-loop-assert.jq)
//schema2: folds a captured NDJSON event stream against this spec into typed per-gap pass/fail records.
//stability: This shape is what the Phase-2 scripted-twin must satisfy — keep it additive-only.
//seed_bead: the fixture bead this cell submits; created by scripts/core-loop-seed.sh from seed-beads.json.
//expect: per-signal expectations; a null/absent field means 'do not assert on it' (e.g. codex model is empty).
//gaps: which coverage gaps this cell is expected to prove. gap1 lands in T2; gap2..gap5 in T4-T8.
//gap-legend: gap1=model reaches harness (C4) · gap2=remote==local (C2) · gap3=provider through sandbox (C3/C6) · gap4=dispatch field fidelity (C7) · gap5=claude worktree->agent_ready (C8)
